caption:
What if the best thing you carried this season was pure colour?

There is something quietly joyful about a bag that looks like it was woven from a Mediterranean daydream — soft mesh, painterly hues, the kind of thing that makes even an ordinary afternoon feel a little more alive. The new Épice arrivals are here, and they brought the whole spectrum with them. Tie a printed scarf at your wrist, let the colours do the talking, and just see where the day takes you.

Bag: @epiceparis
